metadata.title: Quick Side Angle Surprise Secures a Smooth Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a sharp side peek catch two enemies off guard with steady aim and timing. Small moves, big impact in this tight spot.
Where do you like to take quick angles in your games? Share your plays below!

Got a slick peek play like this? Drop your best clips in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
